overview: Global Trek — India's premier Himalayan trekking and pilgrimage platform with 15 treks, 4 yatras, full booking system, and world-class SEO.
features: 15 Himalayan trek pages with full itineraries, altitude charts, and booking
4 sacred yatra pages (Kedarnath, Char Dham, Do Dham, Panch Kedar)
Complete technical SEO with JSON-LD schemas, geo meta tags, and Open Graph for every page
XML sitemap system (7 sitemaps including image and trek sitemaps)
9 city landing pages for Delhi, Mumbai, Bangalore, Dehradun, and international visitors
Trek detail pages with AMS altitude context, visual difficulty bars, and sticky booking sidebar
8-channel contact hub with WhatsApp, callback, and video consultation
Floating contact widgets on every page (WhatsApp, callback, live chat)
